element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns directional aiming and rhythm of sustained fire
Recognition of predictable wave patterns and dodge timing
Risk assessment: collecting power-ups vs. maintaining safe position
Single opponent with extended attack patterns; teaches pattern memorization

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Wave-based tension: rapid enemy formations build pressure, brief calm periods allow breathing room, boss fights spike difficulty sharply

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction with manageable enemy density and basic projectile patterns
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating formation complexity and increased projectile density requiring tighter dodging
notable_spikes: First boss encounter introduces pattern-based attack complexity beyond standard enemy waves
Stage progression increases enemy spawn rate and formation sophistication

notable_level_patterns.description: Stages begin with manageable enemy waves, gradually increase density and complexity, culminate in boss fight
Each stage ends with a single boss encounter that must be defeated to progress; boss introduces new attack patterns not seen in standard enemy waves

metadata.data_quality: T3 - qualitative only; source provided (tcrf.net) contained only navigation/metadata with no actual game design documentation
metadata.notes: The provided TCRF source contains only website navigation and policy information, not game-specific design data. All values above are derived from genre conventions for SNES shmups circa 1991, not documented source material.
